preprocessing: resize shortest-edge 384 bicubic -> center-crop 384 -> /255 -> (x-0.5)/0.5 -> NCHW RGB
note: Borderline images (classical art, swimwear) are NON-EXPLICIT proxies used to demonstrate the score gradient and the review/block bands. True explicit-content recall is per Marqo's published eval (no explicit imagery was collected). All images sourced from Wikimedia Commons.
